'''Docking Bay 9372''' was a [[Hangar/Legends|docking bay]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. In [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]], [[Daeshara'cor]] took the ''[[Lucky Star II]]'' from it to [[Vortex/Legends|Vortex]]. [[Chalco]] often tarried in the bay.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Tide II: Ruin]]'' {{1st}}

|es=Muelle de Embarque 9372
